units.content: Claim 1's convergence analyser performs real-time classification into four convergence values
Claim 1's convergence analyser includes a per-measurer correlation analyser

Claim 1 is distinguished from Rukhin by the same basis as CODATA 2022 (ref v6.1.7): real-time four-value classification and per-measurer correlation analysis are not present in Rukhin's metrological reference-value procedures
